headline: Netflix Stock Crashed 10% — But This Billionaire Loaded Up $1 Billion Before The Fall: Who's Right?
summary: Netflix Inc just flipped from momentum darling to battleground stock — overnight. A near 10% pre-market drop on weak second-quarter guidance has investors hitting sell, even as one billionaire sits on a billion-dollar bet made just weeks ago. That tension is where the real story begins. Billionaire Bet Vs Market Reaction As of the fourth quarter of 2025, Philippe Laffont of Coatue Management boosted its Netflix stake by over 75% to roughly 10.8 million shares, building a position worth around $1
